'''Wroonian''' was the native language spoken by [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonians]]. This language was official on the planet [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]] and on some colonies, such as [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]].

==Examples==
*'''Saleucami''' 'oasis'<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]]
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
